tts_samples.text: Hello! I am MindMate, your AI emotional companion. How are you feeling today?
I've noticed you've been working hard lately. Remember to take a deep breath and stay hydrated.
It's okay to feel overwhelmed sometimes. I'm here to listen whenever you're ready to talk.
That’s a great insight! Your progress in the last week has been truly impressive.
I'm here to help you navigate through these complex emotions. Let's start with a simple breathing exercise.

stt_dummy_phrases: I had a really long day at work and I'm feeling quite stressed.
Today was actually pretty good, I went for a run and felt energized.
I'm struggling to sleep because I can't stop thinking about tomorrow's presentation.
I felt a sudden wave of anxiety while I was grocery shopping earlier.
I'm starting to notice a pattern in my mood when I don't get enough rest.

curls.tts: curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/voice/tts -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"text\": \"Hello from MindMate!\", \"voice\": \"af_heart\"}"
